programs.name: Residence for Private Purposes (Not for Gainful Activities)
programs.tagline: An annual quota of opportunity to become a permanent EU resident
programs.description: This program provides a direct path to permanent residency in Austria for those who are able to live there without the need of employment – with no investment required.
programs.intro: If you are a non-EU resident without the need of employment, and would like to reside there with your family, this is an option for you to seriously consider. Through this specific residency permit, individuals may become a resident in Austria along with their spouse and children under eighteen, with a route to permanent residency after five years.
benefits: Visit Schengen states without the need of a visa
Move to Austria with spouse and children under eighteen
After five years, permanent residency can be applied for – allowing residence in any EU country
After ten years of residency, apply for Austrian citizenship
No investment required for this residency permit
requirements: Applicants must be of independent means and without need of employment – no right to work in Austria, including running your own business
Funds must be shown in an international bank account – amount varies depending on number of dependents
A University Degree – if not held, applicant must demonstrate basic German language skills within two years of arrival
Reside in Austria for at least 183 days per year
Health insurance providing full cover for each family member in Austria

steps.title: Submit Your Application
steps.description: Applications are subject to an annual quota. Applications are prepared for submission early each year to ensure the applicant secures their place.

steps.title: Residence Permit Issued
steps.description: With a successful application, your residency permit will initially be issued annually.

steps.title: Second Permit Renewal
steps.description: Within the first two years, applicants without a Bachelor's or Master's degree must demonstrate A1 level German language skills (excludes children under 14).

steps.title: Permanent Residency
steps.description: After five years of residence, apply for permanent residency. Those without a degree must demonstrate German language level B1.

steps.title: Citizenship
steps.description: After ten years, apply to become an Austrian citizen.

programs.name: Residency Through the Entrepreneur Program
programs.tagline: Business Start-Up Visa
programs.description: A residency pathway for entrepreneurs, business professionals, skilled individuals, and high net worth investors willing to invest in a local Belgian business.
eligibleApplicants: High net worth individuals willing and able to invest in a local Belgian business
benefits: Belgium provides a strong European presence
No minimum stay requirements per year
Only 3 years before citizenship application can be made
No restrictions on dual citizenship
Free travel across the Schengen Zone/EU without visa requirements
requirements: Minimum €300,000 available for the immigration program
Investment must be by means of monetary fund
Investment must be into a Belgian local business or project which creates jobs, or alternatively a start-up Belgian enterprise
services: Advice and assistance with the application from start to finish
Tax advice
Assistance dealing with necessary authorities
Bank account opening
Liaison with all local and government authorities
Submission of the application to the relevant government authorities
Advice and assistance when renewing your permit
Assistance with obtaining the permanent residence permit

programs.name: Permanent Residency through Property Investment
programs.tagline: Investment-based permanent residency with a route to EU citizenship
programs.description: An investment-based opportunity for individuals who invest €300,000 in Bulgaria, qualifying for Permanent Residency via the Foreigners in the Republic of Bulgaria Act, Article 25 (August 2009), ratified by the EU.
programs.intro: Permanent residency of Bulgaria is granted to citizens of any country (and their spouse and children under 18) who invest in the country through certain terms outlined in the Act. The key advantage is there is no obligation to reside in Bulgaria to obtain or retain Permanent Residency.
countryAdvantages: Free trade environment within the EU
keyFeatures: Promoted and run by a leading Bulgarian law firm
Specialist scheme offering a secure route to permanent residency for you and your immediate family
Unique and structured path to take advantage of the legislation
You control your investment portfolio at all times
benefits: No requirement to live in Bulgaria to obtain permanent residency
Residency usually obtained in four to six months
Investment capital returned if application is not successful (guaranteed)
Property investment opportunity for capital growth and rental income
Guaranteed rental yield and significant VAT reclaim
Visa-free travel throughout the Schengen zone
Apply for a European Union passport after five years
Children under 18 years can be included in the application
Investment capital remains under your control
Access to European universities at EU rates
Low legal and application fees
programs.note: Bulgaria is set to gain a place within the Schengen zone shortly.

programs.name: Residence Permit for Non-EU Citizens
programs.tagline: Property-based residency with a pathway to EU citizenship
programs.description: If you purchase a property in Cyprus, you may qualify for a Residence Permit, granting long-term residency with a pathway to Cypriot citizenship.
benefits: Pathway to permanent citizenship after seven years
No obligation to live in Cyprus – just return once every two years
Visa-free entry and residency in Cyprus
Freedom of movement within the Schengen zone
Permit extends to spouse, parents and financially dependent children
Tax liability in Cyprus is unaffected
requirements: A new property worth €300,000 or more
Payment of at least €200,000
Annual global income of €30,000 or more
Annual income of €5,000 for dependent children and €8,000 for parents
A minimum of €30,000 deposited in Cyprus for 3 years
No criminal record
Visit at least once every 2 years
programs.dependents: Spouse, parents, and financially dependent children

programs.name: Business Startup Visa
programs.tagline: Introduced in 2017 to encourage innovative businesses
programs.description: A visa scheme for non-EU startup founders looking to establish innovative businesses in Cyprus.
visaTypes: Group startup visa (founder and up to 4 senior executives)
requirements: Non-EU nationality
Start-up capital of €50,000 or more
An innovative business or business plan
Plans for a business HQ in Cyprus
Effective management in Cyprus
Tax residency in Cyprus
An undergraduate degree or equivalent
Fluency in either Greek or English

programs.name: Citizenship & Passport by Investment
programs.tagline: One of only two EU nations offering citizenship by investment
programs.description: The Cypriot government's citizenship by investment scheme requiring a minimum €2 million investment.
eligibleInvestments: Purchase or construction of buildings, infrastructure or land development projects
Alternative Investment Funds or other assets licensed by CySec
Purchase or creation of a Cypriot business
Participation in an existing Cypriot business
Purchasing government bonds (maximum €500,000 as proportion of total investment)
benefits: Council of Ministers decision in only 3 months after receiving the application
No local tax obligation if staying less than 183 days per year in Cyprus
After citizenship, can purchase properties in any EU country
Visa-free travel to 157 countries
Minimum visit requirement of once every seven years
Investors can include children up to 28 years old if in full-time education
No language requirements
requirements: Minimum €2 million investment retained for at least three years
Purchase of a house in Cyprus worth at least €500,000 (plus VAT) if passing benefits to family
Benefits can be passed down to children, parents and other benefactors
realEstateNotes: Investors may sell properties after three years, keeping only one residence worth $500,000
May purchase one or more properties as long as total exceeds minimum investment requirement
programs.bankDepositNote: The previous requirement of a $5 million fixed deposit in a Cypriot bank was abolished in September 2016.
programs.businessRequirement: If investing in a Cypriot business, it must be located within the Republic and employ at least 5 Cypriot citizens.

programs.name: Real Estate Investment
programs.tagline: Apartments and villas in one of Europe's lifestyle and business capitals
programs.description: Investment opportunities in prime Cypriot apartments and villas, suitable for lifestyle, rental income, or qualifying for residency.

propertyTypes.description: Prime Cypriot apartments ideal for small-scale investment, one-man startups, or wealthy investors looking to enter the Cypriot market.
Premium villas representing lifestyle and business investment opportunities, ideal for capitalising on the tourist and business boom.

programs.note: Property purchases for holiday purposes automatically entitle buyers to 180 days per year in Cyprus.

programs.name: Czech Residency through Business
programs.tagline: Long-term residency through company formation
programs.description: The Czech Republic government promotes businesses that contribute to employment and generate value for the economy. Full residency package including company formation through to long-term residency in under a year.
benefits: Route to long-term residency permit after three months
Permanent EU residency after five years if requirements are met
Apply for citizenship after ten years of residence
Reside with dependents – spouse and children under eighteen

steps.title: Business Visa Application
steps.description: A business visa is required as the first step to enter the Czech Republic, valid for six months. Applied from the embassy in your country of residence.

steps.title: Enter Czech Republic and Register Address
steps.description: Within three days of arrival you must register your address with the local police.

steps.title: Apply for Long Term Residency
steps.description: Three months before your business visa expiry, apply for a long-term residency permit. Typically valid for one year with option to extend.

requirements: Documentation proving your registered company in the Czech Republic
Proof of living expenses – salary from Czech company or evidence of funds in bank account
Health insurance at a minimum of €60,000
Accommodation organised and two months rental paid prior to visa application
services: Entire process handled by the team
Handling all documentation from business visa application form
Apartment booking in Czech Republic for two months in advance
Legal proof of address
Address registration
Long-term residency permit application

programs.name: German Residence Through Business / Entrepreneurship
programs.tagline: Residency in the world's third largest economy through business
programs.description: Germany is the most widely spoken first language in the EU and the third largest economy in the world. German law is welcoming towards legitimate business activities and encourages local economic growth.
benefits: Reside in Germany with spouse and children under eighteen
Eligible for Permanent Residency after three years
Apply for citizenship after eight years of residing in Germany
qualificationCriteria: Business must serve Germany's higher economic interest or a special regional need
Expectation that the business will have a positive effect on the economy
Financing secured through equity or bank loan
Business must not damage Germany's overall economic interests
programs.businessPlanNotes: A business plan is mandatory when applying for a residency permit based on opening a business. The plan will be prepared by a specialist in Germany based on specific information provided by the applicant.
services: Collecting documents according to checklist
Submitting all documents
Streamlining supplementary documents
Handling questions and explanations from authorities, if applicable
General advice and instruction during the application process

programs.name: German Residence to Search for a Job
programs.tagline: Six-month permit for qualified non-EU nationals to find employment
programs.description: Germany welcomes highly qualified people to live there and look for a job. Non-EU nationals holding an academic degree may live in Germany for six months to find employment.
requirements: Job search permit must be applied for from the home country
Must provide evidence of a valid academic qualification
Must show evidence of sufficient funds to finance yourself for the next six months

programs.name: Hungarian Residency through Business
programs.tagline: Business-based residency with a path to permanent EU residency
programs.description: Residency permits in Hungary are available for paid activity, educational purposes, family reunification, medical treatment, accredited research, and voluntary work. Required for stays exceeding 90 days. Granted to non-EU individuals to promote business and entrepreneurship.
benefits: Visa-free travel to other Schengen countries
No work permit required for the director/owner of a Hungarian company
Eligible for Permanent Residency after 3 years
Stay in Hungary with spouse and children under eighteen

steps.title: Incorporation
steps.description: Our team helps incorporate a company with Power of Attorney. Each company must have a Hungarian bank account.

steps.title: Business Plan
steps.description: A business plan is mandatory before the visa application is formulated.

steps.title: Housing Search
steps.description: Applicant needs a rented or purchased property for a resident address. Property viewings can be arranged if visiting Hungary, or lease secured via POA if not.

steps.title: Insurance
steps.description: Private health insurance with comprehensive coverage in Hungary is required. State insurance is also acceptable if employed at minimum wage within own company.

steps.title: Visa Application
steps.description: Apply for an entry visa in your country of citizenship or residence. Visa obtained within 30 days. First visa typically issued for 1 year, then renewable based on business progress.

steps.title: Local Registration upon Arrival
steps.description: Residency must be registered within 48 hours of arrival.

requirements: Business plan
Accommodation
Health insurance
Director salary of at least €18,000 per annum with evidence of savings to support dependents
Must travel to Hungary within ten months of visa issuance
Local registration within 48 hours of arrival
services: Collating documents in line with the checklist
Handling all necessary official translations (at additional cost)
Compilation and submission of documents
Handling legal questions from authorities
Submission of outstanding/supplementary documentation
General advice and instruction during the application process
Personal representation in official matters, as permitted by law
Handling appeals (additional fees may apply)

programs.name: Self-Employed Persons Visa
programs.tagline: Residency through business ownership in one of the world's wealthiest nations
programs.description: Norway is the second wealthiest nation and a popular destination for those looking to start up and expand businesses. This opportunity enables you to start and operate in an executive or managerial position in a company in Norway.
benefits: Permit initially granted for one year
Permit is connected to the company – does not allow employment under any other means
Eligible to apply for permanent residency
Family members can also apply for residency alongside the main applicant
requirements: Business objective must be very clear
Running the business must be the sole reason for the stay in Norway
Must prove there is a financial basis for operating the business
Must provide a business plan
services: Managing the process end-to-end
Counselling and consultation at each step
Tracking the progress of the application
Tax planning
Legal assistance

programs.name: Portugal's Golden Visa
programs.tagline: Fast-track residency for investors in one of Europe's most emerging markets
programs.description: Portugal's Golden Visa is a fast-track option for investors to obtain a residency permit in Portugal, enabling visa-free travel in 26 European Schengen zone countries.
benefits: Minimum residence of only 7 days in the first year and 14 days in successive years
Permanent Residency eligibility after five years
Citizenship eligibility after six years

qualifyingInvestments.description: Minimum capital investment of €1 million in shares or a business
Minimum capital investment of $350,000 when funding scientific research activities
Minimum capital investment of €250,000 when funding arts and culture
Reduced minimum for those investing in designated areas of urban renewal
Minimum investment of $500,000 for any property in any location. Must prove investment with a property deed or promissory agreement and valid Land Registry certificate.
Creation of 30 local jobs in any area for all types of businesses. No minimum investment required. All employees must be registered with Social Security.

programs.name: Spain – Residence through Investment (Golden Visa)
programs.tagline: Residency, EU freedom, and real estate opportunities for non-EU investors
programs.description: Spain's Investment Visa (Golden Visa) was launched to attract entrepreneurs and foreign investors, enabling non-EU nationals to attain qualified residency permits in return for investing in Spanish real estate, companies, or bonds.
benefits: No minimum stay requirement to renew visa
Property can be rented for income
Joint buyers can combine investments into one property
Free movement within the 26 countries of the Schengen zone
Residence visas may be issued to spouse, non-married partners and children up to 18 years
Visa initially granted for 1 year
eligibilityCriteria: Minimum investment of €500,000 (may be spread over multiple properties, total must reach minimum)
Sufficient economic means to cover any stay in Spain
Must not have previously been refused visa or entry into the Schengen zone
programs.dependents: Spouse, non-married partners, and children up to 18

programs.name: Swiss Investor Visa
programs.tagline: Permanent Residency in Switzerland through company investment
programs.description: Gain permanent residency in Switzerland through investing in a Swiss company.
eligibleApplicants: People who are selling an existing company
Businessmen not currently trading in Switzerland
People able to live on their assets and who do not require employment
benefits: Very friendly tax system
Central European location
Highest quality of living in the world
eligibilityCriteria: Minimum investment of 500,000 CHF (approx. €420,000) into a company in the area where you will reside, with a view to creating jobs – investment into stocks and shares is not sufficient
Should reside in Switzerland for the majority of the time
Must demonstrate ties with Switzerland (e.g. past holidays, friends, relatives), unless a famous artist

programs.name: UK Entrepreneur Visa (Tier 1)
programs.tagline: Start or invest in a UK business for a route to permanent residency
programs.description: Non-EU citizens have the option of investing £200,000 for the Tier 1 Entrepreneur Visa, enabling them to start a business or invest in an existing business in the UK.
programs.eligibility: Application can be made by either one non-EU entrepreneur or an entrepreneurial team of two business partners.
eligibilityCriteria: Must invest £200,000 directly into a UK company
During first three years, must employ two additional full-time staff for at least 12 months each
Must demonstrate £200,000 available to invest plus sufficient funds to support self and dependents
Validation of source of funds is mandatory
benefits: Visa can be granted in a few weeks
Eligibility to permanent residence after five years
Citizenship eligibility after six years if criteria continue to be met
services: Immigration services for the entrepreneur and their dependents
UK company formation and tax authority registration
Introduction of existing businesses seeking investment

programs.name: UK Investor Visa (Tier 1)
programs.tagline: A direct route to permanent residency for high-net-worth investors
programs.description: The Tier 1 Investor Visa provides an investor with a direct route to permanent residency and citizenship for themselves and their immediate family.
requirements: Minimum investment of £2 million GBP into a UK business

programs.name: Tier 4 Student Visa
programs.tagline: Study in the UK on an approved higher education course
programs.description: The UK study visa is available to non-EU citizens looking to study on an approved higher education course.
requirements: Offer letter from an approved educational institute

programs.name: UK Property Investment
programs.tagline: Expert guidance for investing in UK real estate
programs.description: With a large range of options available to invest in UK real estate, our legal experts provide the right guidance to move forward, including introductions to credible UK realtors and legal assistance.
services: Introduction to credible UK realtors
Legal assistance throughout the purchase process
Guidance through legal work and negotiations

programs.name: Dubai Golden Visa
programs.tagline: Long-term residency for global investors, entrepreneurs, and talented individuals
programs.description: The Dubai Golden Visa offers long-term residency (5 or 10 years) to investors, entrepreneurs, professionals, scientists, and talented individuals in various fields, allowing them to live, work, and study in the UAE with 100% business ownership.
benefits: Long-term residency options: 5- or 10-year visas
No local sponsor required
100% foreign business ownership
Family can be sponsored (spouse, children, domestic helpers)
Multiple entries permitted for application
Ability to stay outside the UAE without visa annulment
Access to world-class amenities and infrastructure
requirements: Real estate investment of AED 2 million or more OR
Public investments (deposit, company shares, or investment funds) of AED 2 million or more OR
Entrepreneurs: Own a company with minimum AED 500,000 capital or approval for a startup by a UAE recognized business incubator
Special categories: Outstanding students, scientists, doctors, creatives may also qualify
services: Application preparation and review
Government liaison and paperwork support
On-the-ground guidance in Dubai
Family and dependent visa processing
programs.dependents: Spouse, children (any age if unmarried), and domestic helpers
